sourceMovie.title: Centurion
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Centurion (2010) as a adventure theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The adventure and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Gladiator II
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Centurion clicked for you, Gladiator II (2024) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: King Arthur
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Centurion clicked for you, King Arthur (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Four Feathers
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Centurion clicked for you, The Four Feathers (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Police Story 4: First Strike
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Centurion clicked for you, Police Story 4: First Strike (1996) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Centurion?
faq.answer: Try Gladiator II, King Arthur, The Four Feathers—each shares DNA with Centurion while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Centurion?
faq.answer: Centurion (2010) is best described as Adventure, Action, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Centurion worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this adventure lane.
